channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - techraptor.net
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: Stonemaier Games Announces Finspan: Sharks & Reefs Expansion, and Revised Version of Euphoria
item.content:encoded:
Stonemaier Games has announced two new board game projects. The first is Finspan: Sharks & Reefs, an official expansion to the sealife preservation board game. The other is Euphoria Essential Edition, a revised version of the dystopian worker placement game.

In an official press release, Finspan: Sharks & Reefs introduces new rules and game pieces, allowing players to nurture their own coral reef. These reefs will attract powerful fish, unlock fish abilities, and score bonuses at the end of the game. In addition, sharks will scatter your schools of fish, leaving behind food scraps that any fish in your ocean can consume.

You will need the Finspan base game to play this expansion. The expansion will contain a card tray, designed to contain game pieces for current and future expansion cards and tokens. This tray is designed to conveniently fit in the base game's box.

Finspan: Sharks & Reefs is the first expansion for Finspan. The game is seen as a companion to Wingspan, the bird-themed board game designed by Elizabeth Hargrave, and Wyrmspan, the fantasy-themed game about managing a dragon sanctuary. At the time of writing, no price has been listed, but orders made on Stonemaier's website will be fulfilled in May 2026, with a retail release coming in mid-June.

The Euphoria Essential Edition Announcement

The second board game, Euphoria Essential Edition, is a revised version of the original 2014 board game combined with the 2019 Ignorance is Bliss expansion. This edition introduces revised rules and components alongside an updated board layout.

The unique hook of Euphoria Essential Edition is that it is a worker placement game where you are the head of a dystopian society. Your workers are represented by dice, the result representing that worker's knowledge. This knowledge is compared to the knowledge of other players' workers.

As workers move through your city and more workers are added, the more will discover about the twisted society you rule over. If they learn too much, they may leave your cause, leading to a drain of crucial workers. 

If you already own Euphoria, an update pack will be made available. This pack will include the updated board layout, revised rulebooks, and smaller artifact cards.

At time of writing, no release date or price has been listed for Euphoria Essential Edition.

Ever since he was small, Tyler Chancey has had a deep, abiding love for video games and a tendency to think and overanalyze everything he enjoyed. This… More about Tyler

item.title: Free League Launches Symbaroum 10th Anniversary Kickstarter, Providing New Setting and Revised Rules
item.content:encoded:
Free League has announced a revised edition of one of their TTRPGs is coming to crowdfunding. The Symbaroum 10th Anniversary Kickstarter is set to released revised and updated versions of the game's core rulebooks alongside a new setting.

The Symbaroum 10th Anniversary Kickstarter Announcement

According to a press release, the Symbaroum 10th Anniversary Kickstarter will launch on May 19, 2026. The project will streamline the contents of the original game's four core books into three hardcover volumes: the Core Rulebook, the Gamemaster's Guide, and the Davokar Creature Codex.

The Core Rulebook by itself contains everything a group needs to play Symbaroum. In addition to the core rules, the book includes a tutorial adventure, guidelines for creating homebrew scenarios, and an introduction to the dark fantasy setting of Davokar. 

If you want a more involved experience, the Gamemaster's Guide provides advanced rules. These rules include adventure creation, campaign building,  and optional rules for large-scale battles, advanced traps, and social scheming. Lastly, the Creature Codex, the game's bestiary, will feature updated practical stat blocks, making the game more accessible.

For longtime fans, the Symbaroum 10th Anniversary Kickstarter will contain something new. City States of Vendilyn – A Ravaged Realm is a new campaign setting, one where survivors struggle to endure after the once-peaceful realm devastated by the malevolent elves of Duskwood.

Additional details are scarce, but the release does confirm all four books will be produced in English and feature artwork by Martin Grip and Gustaf Ekelund. Grip will also be contributing new artwork to the revised Core Rulebook.

Symbaroum is an acclaimed fantasy RPG that has spanned dozens of books and products since its original 2014 release in Sweden. It has plenty of prewritten adventures, healthy third-party support, spawned an epic six-part campaign, Throne of Thorns, and even received an adaptation to the system of Dungeons & Dragons.

Ever since he was small, Tyler Chancey has had a deep, abiding love for video games and a tendency to think and overanalyze everything he enjoyed. This… More about Tyler
